title: South London Jazz Orchestra
description: The South London Jazz Orchestra returns to Brighton to dazzle you with big band favourites from the whole history of jazz - as well as some more surprising choices - in an evening of funk, Latin, and of course, classic swing. Dancing in the aisles will be positively encouraged, or just sit back and enjoy timeless tunes from the likes of Glenn Miller, Duke Ellington, Count Basie and many more.
content_warnings: We are a BIG band so we are pretty loud
